text.title: GitHub Actions — Matrix Builds Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns from real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Matrix uses `${{ vars.PY }}`; nobody knows which versions run today.
First Linux failure kills Windows run; Windows bug undetected.
antipattern.fix: Set fail-fast: false when cross-OS signal matters.

antipattern.symptom: Matrix 60 jobs starves other workflows; queue saturated.
antipattern.fix: Set max-parallel aligned with concurrency plan.

antipattern.symptom: Last job overwrites coverage of previous combinations.
antipattern.fix: Include matrix vars in artifact name.
